title: quercus oxyodon
intro: Quercus oxyodon, also known as the Taiwanese evergreen oak, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family, native to Taiwan. The bark and leaves of the Quercus oxyodon plant are rich in tannins and flavonoids, which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties. Quercus oxyodon has been found to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to protect against various health issues such as cardiovascular disease, cancer, and infections. The herbal preparations of Quercus oxyodon include tea, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
